positive: A vibrant, stylized tropical hummingbird hovering near a bioluminescent orchid. The background is a deep indigo jungle canopy at twilight. Strong contrast achieved with electric emerald greens, neon pinks, and luminous cyan highlights. Focus on clean silhouette and intricate wing detail. Art style should be 'Neo-Art Deco Botanical Minimalism', utilizing thick, clean linework and flat areas of saturated color, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, symmetrical arrangement, centered on the orchid and bird. Hyper-detailed, vector art quality, perfect for textile print.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, cropped, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, muddy color, bokeh, depth of field
